019f7e89-c031-7f6f-ab24-f9de8dd4819d.text: Durr Vistaintra wall mounting so they can make sure the power for the xray is in the correct place. at the mounting point it requires a mains with remote isolation and minimum 2 core cable cable to run back to where the user will be exposing the xray (this is where the switch will be mounted unless they are going for a remote control panel - hope not)
